programme.title: Rescue from Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways must try to readjust to life in civilization after they are rescued from the island

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: The Gravest Military Mistakes In History- Tin Soldiers
programme.desc: 20th Century beliefs that a new military technology would bring about cleaner wars and reduce casualties are confounded in this look at modern warfare from the Battle of the Somme to the Gulf War

programme.title: Incredible Home Movies From WW2
programme.desc: How WW2 was documented by home movie makers This episode looks at how women delt with the war and how the responsibilty and credibility of women grew as the war went on

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: The Hunt For The Hood
programme.desc: The Hunt to Find Britains Greatest Battleship She was a mighty symbol of Britains greatness yet she was destroyed in just three-and-a-half minutes Had the ship been fatally weakened by her twenty long years of all-but-continuous operations on the high seas Hopefully resurrecting this magnificent warship will provide the answers to the questions that have baffled a generation

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 1
programme.desc: Battlefield Vietnam 1

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 4
programme.desc: Part 4 Showdown in the Iron Triangle

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Knight 310
programme.desc: Knight 310

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A hot-rod racer uses a cursed necklace to win events by killing his competition and dipping the chain in his victims blood

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddy Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Dream Come True the new host of Springwood Confidential Dick Gautier doesnt heed Freddy Kruegers warning to ax his latest show topic Dreams That Kill Meanwhile a doctor performs an experimental procedure that results in a patient Christian Bocher acquiring another mans personality -- and dreams

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampas vanity gets the best of him when he refuses to acknowledge that he needs eyeglasses to pass the vision test for his new California drivers license

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: To keep a priceless diamond out of KAOSs hands a jeweler sells it to 86 for an engagement ring for 99

programme.title: Smart 426
programme.desc: Smart 426

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: What happens when BJ and the Bear transport a circus veteran his granddaughter and their trained elephant through the turf of Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: Mchale 228
programme.desc: Mchale 228

programme.title: Mchale 414
programme.desc: Mchale 414

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A diamond theft on a cruise ship owned by Jonathan leads the Harts to join the cruise ship to catch the thief

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael balks when Mr Vanderkellen demands he sign a prenuptial agreement feeling it indicates a lack of trust on Stephanies part Meanwhile Dick breaks an irreplaceable music box given to the Vanderkellens by Winston Churchill

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is saddled with a perky co-host he doesnt want; Larry Darryl and Darryl name their pet pig after Stephanie

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: The Major Gunny and Holowachuk are on a court martial-panel who are suppose to decide whether the marine on trial is guilty or not It seems the man deserted his post when he learned that something happened to someone in his family And the Major and Gunny are on opposite sides so its Holowahcuk whos the decider So he spends countless time looking at both sides

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Garner go undercover at a chicken fast-food outlet called California Roasters dressed in outrageously silly chicken costumes to arrest a drug dealer But later a hostage situation develops at the Nights club when Mitch Garner Ryan Lou and other patrons are held hostage by the two drug dealers brothers demanding that he be released from prison

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio but gets more than he bargained for

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Daan and demands to know where his men are They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A college teacher is afraid that he will lose a professorship after being accidentally shot during a blackmail payoff

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon does her job all too well when the latest mission requires her to feign love for a vain assassin Meanwhile Briggs and Barney work to get an over-the-hill terrorist out of the way

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E18
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E18

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: The ArgonautsCheyenne meets two prospectors whose partner was killed by Indians The partner is the only one who knows where they found gold Given a description Cheyenne is able to lead them to the gold but one of the mens greed overtakes him

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexander Shlemenko v. Paul Bradley

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Georgina van der Linden v. Samantha Van Doorn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rodrigo Damm v. Kultar Singh Gill

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tom Spooner v. Hristo Hristov

programme.desc: Moktar Benkaci v. Vitaly Branchuk

programme.desc: Martin Pacas v. Ismael Lazaar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kingsley Crawford v. Festus Ahorlu

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tiffany Cass v. Janice MacAulay

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mike Hernandez is here to take the Bantamweight title away from Jesse Arnett. Coming off of a 6 win streak, he is in the Hard Knocks cage for nothing else but the belt!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chaleur Jones

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Vladimir Zenin v. Nick Aggalar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill re-programs Scooter making him into a suicide bomber aimed at UNECOMs headquarters

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years
